summary: Iteration 100: Verified Mira OS Demo Page features - Rich CONCIERGE responses, feedback endpoint, remember endpoint, dock navigation, and product display. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional.

mira_os_understand_with_products.details: Returns rich CONCIERGE responses with breed-specific tips, products, and concierge handoff info

mira_feedback.details: Accepts positive/negative feedback, stores in mira_feedback collection

mira_remember.details: Requires auth, stores pet memories in mira_memories collection

mira_memories_get.details: Returns stored memories for a pet

mira_demo_page_load.details: Page loads with Mira OS branding, pet badge (Buddy • Golden Retriever)

dock_navigation.details: All dock items visible with data-testid attributes and clickable

help_modal.details: Opens on Help click, shows options: Order & Delivery Help, Health & Advisory, Returns & Exchanges, Chat with Concierge

mira_search_response.details: Returns rich response with PLAN intent, Concierge execution type

intent_badges.details: PLAN badge (amber) and Concierge badge visible

concierge_handoff_section.details: 'Your Pet Concierge is on it' section with Chat with Concierge button

products_display.details: Real products shown with images, prices (₹4999), and 'Real Products' badge

feedback_buttons.details: Was this helpful? prompt with thumbs up/down buttons

personalization.details: 'Why for Buddy' section explains breed-specific recommendations

rich_concierge_response_verification.sample_response: Let's make Buddy's birthday unforgettable! 🎉 Golden Retrievers like Buddy thrive in energetic settings, so planning a party with activities like fetch games or a small splash pool can be ideal. Since we need to avoid his chicken allergy and consider treats that won't lead to weight gain, we'll ensure snacks are both safe and enticing. Your concierge will help organize the perfect venue, cake, and guest lineup. They'll reach out within 1 hour.

seed_data_creation: Created test user and test pet memories for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 100 verified Mira OS demo page features: 1) Rich CONCIERGE responses working - LLM returns detailed, breed-specific advice with activity suggestions, allergy awareness, and timeline. 2) /api/mira/feedback endpoint stores user feedback. 3) /api/mira/remember requires auth and stores pet memories. 4) All dock navigation items (Concierge, Orders, Plan, Help, Soul) clickable. 5) Help modal opens correctly. 6) Products displayed with real data and prices. 7) Feedback thumbs up/down buttons visible.

rich_concierge_responses.description: CONCIERGE execution type returns detailed, personalized responses - NOT sparse 'I'll connect you' messages
